query: INSERT INTO contract_sign_requests (contract_id, requester_pubkey, requester_ssh_pubkey, requester_contact, provider_pubkey, offering_id, payment_amount_e9s, request_memo, created_at_ns, status, payment_method, stripe_payment_intent_id, stripe_customer_id, payment_status, currency, provisioning_completed_at_ns, end_timestamp_ns) VALUES ($1, $2, 'ssh-key', 'contact', $3, 'off-1', 100000000000, 'memo', 0, 'active', 'stripe', $4, NULL, 'succeeded', 'usd', $5, $6)
